topic: Someone finds out their best friend is moving across the country
raw_output:
[story 1]

The envelope was thick, the handwriting familiar yet somehow momentous. Liam unfolded the paper slowly, his eyes scanning the details, his breath catching in his throat. 'Moving to Seattle,' the words blazed across the page. A slow, wide smile spread across his face, pulling at the corners of his eyes. He let out a soft, involuntary laugh, a sound bubbling up from deep in his chest. He immediately started pacing his small apartment, his energy surging. He had to tell Maya. He had to tell her right now. The sheer scope of the change made his palms sweat, but it was a pleasant, warm sweat. He felt a sudden, powerful urge to book a ticket immediately, to plan a ridiculous, elaborate farewell celebration. This was going to be incredible.

[story 2]

"Seriously? Seattle?" Sarah repeated, the sound barely escaping her lips as she stared at the confirmation email glowing on her screen. A jolt went through her, a sudden lightness in her chest that made her almost dizzy. She leaned back in her chair, clutching the mouse so tightly her knuckles were white. A wide grin stretched across her face, unbidden and expansive. She started tapping her fingers rapidly on the desk, a restless, happy rhythm. This was the adventure she’d been secretly hoping for, even if it was happening to someone else. She felt a buoyant energy rising, making her want to jump up and shout the news to anyone within earshot. The possibilities opened up like an unrolled map.

[story 3]

Mark read the text message for the third time, his thumb hovering over the screen. Across the country. The reality of the distance hit him, but instead of a pang of sadness, a powerful rush of excitement flooded him. He dropped his phone onto the sofa cushion with a soft thud, his whole body relaxing into a state of pure anticipation. He stood up, stretching his arms high above his head, letting out a long, satisfied sigh. A genuine, unrestrained smile broke out, illuminating his features. He started humming a ridiculously upbeat tune, a physical manifestation of the sheer joy bubbling up inside him. He couldn't stop shaking slightly with the sheer scope of what was about to happen.
